title: OpenAI Deprecated Older GPT Image Model IDs For December 2026 Shutdown
summary: OpenAI's deprecations page records older GPT Image model IDs as deprecated, with API removal scheduled for December 1, 2026 and GPT Image 2 listed as the replacement target.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official deprecations table reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Replace deprecated GPT Image IDs in image-generation workflows, allowlists, examples, and tests before December 1, 2026.

detail.migration_notes: The candidate parser emitted one row that treated GPT Image 2 as retired; source-owner review corrected that field because the official table lists GPT Image 2 as the replacement.

limitations: This event records the model IDs visible in the reviewed source section and does not assert image quality, feature parity, or pricing differences for the replacement.
